title: Inside Three Brick Monoliths~UW-Seattle | UW in Red Square - Flickr
content: UW in Red Square: dominated by three brick monoliths, one of which was built to ventilate the underground garage, the other two being erected for aesthetic

title: Do it at night! - Review of Smith Tower Visitor Experience, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: This was a very interesting spot especially at night to see all the city lights. We are so excited that you found our Observatory Bar as exciting and beautiful as we do. We look forward to hosting you back at the historic Smith Tower once more! The Tower in the earliest day was the tallest building before the Space Needle. I have been to different observatories around the world, this was the first time I had it for myself. We look forward to you visiting again, and including you in our history here at the Smith Tower. When I was doing my Seattle sightseeing research, this was not originally on my list as it wasn't very popular with people and no one seemed to really recommend it. Thank you for your review and we look forward to having you back out once more to hopefully create a five star experience here at the historic Smith Tower.
